# GDG

> Congrats on setting up a new Doks project!

- [GDG - Grafana Dash-n-Grab](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/): GDG is a tool used to manage dashboards, connections, orgs and various entities of the Grafana application platform.

## GDG - Grafana Dash-n-Grab

> GDG is a tool used to manage dashboards, connections, orgs and various entities of the Grafana application platform.

- [Releases](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/releases/)
- [GDG](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/gdg/)
- [Usage Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/usage_guide/)
- [Generate Docs (templating)](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/templating/)
- [Tutorials](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/tutorials/)
- [Cookbook](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/cookbook/): A collection of recipes and patterns that can be used with GDG, including kubernetes configs, docker, etc
- [Developer Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/developer/)

### Releases



- [Version 0.9](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/releases/version-0.9/): Release Notes for v0.9
- [Version 0.8](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/releases/version-0.8/): Release Notes for v0.8
- [Version 0.7](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/releases/version-0.7/): Release Notes for v0.7
- [Legacy Versions](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/releases/legacy-versions/): Release Notes for Legacy Versions

### GDG



- [Configuration](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/gdg/configuration/)
- [Getting Started](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/gdg/getting-started/)
- [Installation](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/gdg/installation/)
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/gdg/frequently-asked-questions/)

- [Backup Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/usage_guide/backup-guide/)
- [Tools Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/usage_guide/tools-guide/)
- [Enterprise Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/usage_guide/enterprise-guide/)
- [Other Commands](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/usage_guide/other-commands/)

### Generate Docs (templating)



- [Configuration](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/templating/configuration/)
- [Usage Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/templating/usage-guide/)

### Tutorials



- [Working with Library Panels](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/tutorials/working-with-library-panels/)
- [Organization and Authentication](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/tutorials/organization-and-authentication/)
- [Working with Nested Folders](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/tutorials/working-with-nested-folders/)

### Cookbook

> A collection of recipes and patterns that can be used with GDG, including kubernetes configs, docker, etc

- [Docker Compose Example](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/cookbook/docker-compose-example/): Illustrates an example on how to use docker and taking advantage of the built in secret feature in conjunction with GDG.
- [Kubernetes Crontab Example](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/cookbook/kubernetes-crontab-example/)

### Developer Guide



- [Developer Guide](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/developer/developer-guide/)
- [Contributing](https://software.es.net/gdg/docs/developer/contributing/)
